questions.q: According to the CDC on May 14, 2026, a U.S. patient evacuated from which expedition cruise ship tested negative for hantavirus and was removed from a biocontainment unit?
As reported by the Associated Press on May 14, 2026, the American Academy of Pediatrics issued new guidance for the first time in 13 years regarding which daily school activity?
On May 14, 2026, federal officials announced that $1.3 billion in Medicaid funding to which U.S. state will be deferred over suspicions of fraud?
According to a May 14, 2026 report, the Trump administration widened its Medicaid fraud crackdown to which U.S. state, labeling it a 'hotspot'?
